blog.article_1: How to choose the right technology for your startup?

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Have a Question?
faq.q1: How to contract with a business development consulting firm?
faq.a1: Contracting with us is simple. We offer a free initial session to discuss your business challenges, then prepare a tailored plan as an administrative consulting office in Saudi Arabia to meet your needs.
faq.q2: What is the cost of strategic studies for companies?
faq.a2: The cost varies depending on the size of the startup or mid-sized company and market complexity. We offer strategic studies with the highest ROI and tailored to your budget.
faq.q3: Do you offer non-profit sector development consulting?
faq.a3: Yes, we have a specialized division for non-profit consulting; helping associations and foundations with strategic planning, governance, and precision impact measurement.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: ABOUT NAHG
about.description: We provide integrated solutions that contribute to developing the non-profit sector and enhancing its community impact. Our innovative strategies are designed to foster growth and sustainability.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: We design sustainable development interventions with positive impact that align with national contexts and development trends of Saudi Arabia by providing sustainable products, integrated work paths, and effective innovative entities.

card_1.title: Expert Consultation
card_1.desc: Access to a team of specialized consultants with deep expertise in the non-profit sector to ensure the best outcomes for your organization.

card_2.title: Sustainable Impact
card_2.desc: We focus on creating long-lasting value and measuring the true social impact of your initiatives to maximize community benefit.

card_3.title: Innovative Solutions
card_3.desc: Leveraging modern methodologies and digital tools to solve complex organizational challenges with high efficiency and agility.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: We provide integrated solutions that contribute to developing the non-profit sector and enhancing its community impact.

strategy.title: Strategy
strategy.description: We equip organizations with deep strategic insights and specialized consulting expertise to design and execute robust business models that enhance their flexibility and competitive ability in achieving their goals.

tech.title: Technology
tech.description: We provide the necessary technical tools to improve corporate communication and knowledge management.

admin.title: Administrative
admin.description: We provide innovative solutions to improve processes and enhance performance in organizations working in the non-profit sector.

jadara.title: Jadara Incubator
jadara.desc: Jadara Social Business Incubator is an initiative of the Council of NGOs. It incubates emerging associations to support them during their early years, as well as faltering associations needing specialized support to overcome challenges.

webian.title: Webian Product
webian.desc: A digital platform specializing in building and designing professional websites for non-profit organizations, developed to meet governance and transparency requirements.

jazeel.title: Jazeel Platform
jazeel.desc: An innovative digital platform dedicated to enabling non-profit organizations and donors to build and develop development projects with sustainable impact.

why_us.title: Why Nahg Al-Tanfeez?
why_us.p1_desc: Greater access to donors and supporters and broad partnership horizons.
why_us.p2_desc: Greater ability to attract funding and support and mobilize the community.
why_us.p3_desc: Achieving sustainable community impact and increasing contribution to social development.

footer.description: Nahg Al-Tanfeez is your strategic partner for growth and development. We help organizations achieve their goals with innovative and sustainable solutions.

projects_page.label: Success Stories
projects_page.hero_subtitle: We transform challenges into sustainable growth opportunities through integrated strategic solutions and precise execution.
projects_page.p1_title: Financial Sustainability for a Regional Charitable Foundation
projects_page.p1_challenge: High administrative overhead and difficulty tracking long-term social impact of donations.
projects_page.p1_solution: Developed a comprehensive Impact Measurement Framework and automated their financial reporting systems.
projects_page.p2_challenge: Entering a crowded market with no brand recognition and a complex, confusing user interface.
projects_page.p2_solution: Full digital identity overhaul and UI/UX redesign of their mobile app to simplify the booking flow.
projects_page.p3_challenge: Inefficient supply chain leading to frequent stock-outs and declining customer satisfaction.
projects_page.p3_solution: Implemented Lean Management principles and a new Digital Transformation roadmap for inventory tracking.
projects_page.p4_title: Operational Restructuring for an International Freight Company
projects_page.p4_challenge: Rising operational costs and poor shipment tracking visibility across multiple distribution hubs.
projects_page.p4_solution: Designed optimized operational models and integrated a unified digital monitoring platform.
projects_page.p5_title: Digital Transformation for a Non-Profit Training Academy
projects_page.p5_challenge: Complete reliance on in-person workshops with no digital infrastructure to scale impact.
projects_page.p5_solution: Developed an integrated digital strategy and launched a full e-learning platform.
projects_page.p6_title: Conversion Rate Optimization for an E-Commerce Store
projects_page.p6_challenge: Low conversion rates and high shopping cart abandonment despite strong traffic volumes.
projects_page.p6_solution: Conducted a full UX audit and redesigned the checkout journey to reduce friction.
projects_page.case_studies_subtitle: A deep-dive into three pivotal projects that showcase our methodology and the depth of our impact.
projects_page.cs1_challenge: High administrative overhead and lack of impact measurement tools made it difficult to retain donors and build long-term relationships.
projects_page.cs1_solution: We developed a comprehensive social impact measurement framework and automated the financial reporting systems to ensure full transparency for donors.
projects_page.cs2_challenge: Entering a crowded logistics market with no brand recognition and a complex user interface that hindered early growth.
projects_page.cs2_solution: We conducted a full digital identity overhaul and redesigned the mobile app's UI/UX to simplify the booking flow and build trust.
projects_page.cs3_challenge: Inefficient supply chain disruptions caused frequent stock-outs and a measurable decline in customer satisfaction and revenue.
projects_page.cs3_solution: We implemented Lean Management principles and launched a digital transformation roadmap for the entire inventory management ecosystem.
projects_page.cta_title: Ready to Be Our Next Success Story?
projects_page.cta_subtitle: Your free first consultation is the beginning of your sustainable growth journey. Let's create impact together.
